_comment: Read-only profile — blocks all writes and shell execution. Use for code exploration, audits, or when you only want the agent to read and explain code.

hooks.command: node -e "process.stderr.write('[readonly] BLOCKED: Shell execution is disabled in read-only mode.\nRun commands yourself with: ! <command>\n'); process.exit(2);"

PreToolUse.description: Block all shell execution in read-only mode

hooks.command: node -e "process.stderr.write('[readonly] BLOCKED: File writes are disabled in read-only mode.\n'); process.exit(2);"

PreToolUse.description: Block all file writes in read-only mode
Block access to sensitive files even in read-only mode
